steps.title: Track the bred change
steps.content: The passage contrasts the wild ancestor of summer squash, which had a hard rind and bitter flesh, with the modern crop, which has a soft rind and mild taste. The blank needs a verb meaning that selective breeding caused the crop to come to have those traits.

steps.title: Match the verb to traits
steps.content: A means caused inspiration, not gained characteristics. C suggests giving something up, and D suggests getting something back. None expresses coming to have new traits through breeding. The answer is B.
